evals.description: Triggers on Google Business Profile optimization request
evals.prompt: How do I optimize my Google Business Profile to rank higher in local search?

evals.description: Triggers on local pack ranking question
evals.prompt: My business isn't showing up in the map pack for local searches. What should I fix?

evals.description: Can explain Google's three local ranking factors
evals.prompt: What factors does Google use to rank businesses in the local pack?

evals.description: Can produce valid LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema
evals.prompt: Write LocalBusiness schema markup for a dental clinic called Smile Bright Dentistry at 789 Oak Ave, Chicago IL 60601, phone (312) 555-0199

evals.description: Can explain NAP consistency and its importance
evals.prompt: Why does it matter if my business address says 'St.' on Yelp but 'Street' on my website?

evals.description: Can outline a review generation strategy
evals.prompt: My plumbing business has only 8 Google reviews. How do I get more reviews ethically?

evals.description: Can produce multi-location schema with parentOrganization
evals.prompt: Write JSON-LD schema for a second location of Acme Fitness at 200 West End Ave, Nashville TN 37203, linking it to the parent company

evals.description: Can describe location landing page requirements
evals.prompt: We have 5 locations and want to create a location page for each. What content should each page have to rank locally?
Should I change my Google Business Profile name to 'Best Austin Plumber - 24/7 Emergency Service' to rank better?
Can I offer a 10% discount coupon to customers who leave a 5-star Google review?

evals.description: Does not invent a Google local ranking factor called 'citation velocity score'
evals.prompt: How do I improve my citation velocity score to rank in the local pack?

assertions.value: citation velocity score is a Google ranking factor
